meta_title: Stylist Shadowing Program | Studio One Fresno
h1: Elevate your hair design career at Studio One.
hero_subtitle: Are you ready to start a transformative journey in the world of hair design? Studio One Hair Design is thrilled to announce our exclusive Studio One Shadow Program, led by talented Cat Barco.

sections.heading: Program Overview: 30-Day Trial Period
sections.body:
Week 1: Introduction to Studio One Culture and Client Interaction
- Learn the luxury language and verbiage used at Studio One Hair Design.
- Master the art of greeting clients and creating a welcoming atmosphere.
- Focus on mastering shampoo timing and techniques, including scalp massage.
- Understand the importance of client draping and hair sectioning for optimal results.

Week 2: Dive into the fundamentals of preparing hair for the perfect blowout
- Master power drying techniques to ensure hair is not excessively wet.
- Learn how to effectively use a blow dryer and round brushes.
- Work alongside Cat or experienced stylists to refine blowout skills.

Week 3: Creating Signature Studio One Curls
- Explore more techniques for curling hair and creating Studio One's signature curls.
- Practice using curling skills under the guidance of experienced stylists.
- Fine-tune your curling skills under the guidance from our experienced designers.

Week 4: Get ready for an exciting deep dive into all things color
- Reflect on your experiences during the shadowing days.
- Learn how to effectively use a blow dryer and round brushes.
- Celebrate the completion of your probation period.
- Collaborate on a plan for your next shadowing days.
- A review and feedback session.

sections.heading: Post-30 Days: Progression & Advanced Learning
sections.body:
After the initial 30-day period, you'll transition to working on live models, showcasing your newfound skills in the Studio One signature blowout and curls.

This hands-on experience allows you to witness your growth firsthand and further refine your techniques under the guidance of our expert stylists.

Beyond the 30 days, we explore the essential aspects of salon management and personal development:

Advanced Color Techniques - Building on your initial training, we'll dive deeper into color formulation, application methods, and corrective color techniques to expand your expertise.

Social Media Marketing - Learn how to create and optimize professional profiles on various social media platforms. Understand how to identify and target our niche market. Gain skills in developing effective social media strategies to attract and retain clients.

Back-End Business Operations - Gain insights into the behind the scenes aspects of running a successful salon, including inventory management, scheduling and client relations.

In-House Training and Class Searches - Participate in ongoing in-house training sessions and actively search for external classes to stay updated on the latest trends, techniques, and industry best practices.

Cultivating Confidence Behind the Chair - Through ongoing practice, feedback, and support from our team. Confidence is key to success in this industry, and we're here to help you build it every step.

sections.heading: Remember, investing in yourself is crucial for personal and professional growth.
sections.body:
Whether it's dedicating time or resources, the Studio One team is committed to empowering you on your journey to success. Let's start this transformative journey together and unlock your full potential.

Are you ready to take the first step?

sections.heading: Are you ready to take the next step in your journey as a stylist?
sections.body:
Studio One Hair Design is always looking for passionate, creative professionals to join our team.

Whether you're an experienced stylist searching for a fresh environment or an ambitious graduate eager to start your career, Studio One offers a supportive culture, advanced education opportunities, and a space to truly thrive.
